name: Apple Pull-Aparts
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Golden Delicious apples, peeled, cored and chopped
1/2 cup nuts, finely chopped (I use pecans)
recipeInstructions:
-------------
Combine flour, sugar, yeast, and salt. Heat milk and 2 tablespoons butter to 120 degrees; add egg and blend. Add milk mixture to flour mixture and beat until smooth. Add only enough remaining flour to make a soft dough; knead until satin-smooth. Cover and let rest 20 minutes. Divide dough into 32 pieces; flatten each piece in palm and fill with 1/4 teaspoon filling. Pinch edges together and roll into a ball. Melt remaining butter; dip balls in butter. Arrange 16 filled balls in well-greased tube pan so they just touch in single layer. Sprinkle with half of the remaining apple filling. Add remaining balls; sprinkle with remaining filling on top. Pour any remaining butter over top. Cover and let rise for 20-30 minutes. Bake at 375 degrees for 35-40 minutes. Cool 10 minutes. Invert onto serving plate. Makes 10 servings.
Filling: Mix all ingredients together.
